name: ios-simulator-embed
description: Stream the iOS Simulator into a VS Code webview and forward pointer input (macOS, ScreenCaptureKit).

commands.title: iOS Simulator: Touch / MAP debug checklist

ios-simulator-embed.targetBundleId.description: If set, only windows whose owning bundle ID equals this value are streamed (copy bundleId from “List capture windows” NDJSON). Example: com.apple.iphonesimulator

ios-simulator-embed.simulatorUdid.description: Booted simulator UDID for Indigo touch injection (`xcrun simctl list devices | grep Booted`). Leave empty if only one simulator is booted.

ios-simulator-embed.debugTouches.description: Log each touch to the Output panel (iOS Simulator Embed) and show a small coordinate HUD in the stream webview.

ios-simulator-embed.debugTouchPipeline.description: Verbose touch pipeline: native helper echoes OK:d|m|u after each accepted HID send; extension logs throttled (skipped) moves and a one-line gesture summary on pointer up. Uses Output → “iOS Simulator Embed”. Start a new touch session after toggling (release pointer, or stop/reopen the stream panel).

ios-simulator-embed.debugMap.description: Log LCD letterbox (MAP) diagnostics: show Output when MAP is skipped, reject reasons, and verbose MAP_DEBUG from the native stream helper.

ios-simulator-embed.mapStackVerticalLett.description: MAP: treat vertical letterbox as chrome above the LCD only (padBottom = 0, LCD bottom-aligned in the captured window). Disable to use centered vertical fit (equal padTop/padBottom).
